MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Melvin C. Belli (415-981-1850; mcb@thebellilawfirm.com) Moving Party.
No other appearances.

Mr. Belli's audio connection on zoom was unclear and was instructed to dial into the zoom hearing using the telephone line instead. Mr. Belli disconnected from Zoom and did not return. The Court rules as follows:

Melvin C. Belli/Robert JA Fordiani's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFF CRISTINA FARRAR is off calendar.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***After the morning calendar, the clerk received an email from Mr. Belli stating that he had technical difficulties, but what he wanted to tell the Court this morning was that he was dropping the motion to withdraw.***
